summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification only. The hydrated preflight artifact covers 20 of 25 listed PRs; all hydrated refs are open pull requests and no security-sensitive refs were reported by preflight. No close, merge, fix, label, or comment mutation is planned because this shard has no canonical family and the job blocks merge/fix/raise_pr while disabling low-signal and instant closeout.
